name: Raisin Brown Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the flours and salt in a large bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, combine molasses, baking soda, buttermilk or sour milk, and stir until smooth.
3. Add the dry mixture to the wet mixture and stir until just combined.
4. Fold in the raisins.
5. Grease a 1-liter loaf pan and pour the batter into the pan.
6. Bake for 1 hour at 350°F (175°C).
7. Serve with baked beans.
